summary: Tests cover core module functions (parsing XML/JSON, aggregation, flaky detection, markdown generation) but lack entry-point testing (aggregate.ps1), malformed input handling, and edge cases. Happy-path coverage is solid with clear organization, but edge case rigor is minimal (no tests for empty datasets, special characters, null values, malformed XML/JSON). External fixture dependency without creation code is a design concern. Would catch regressions in standard aggregation logic but miss integration issues, boundary conditions, and error scenarios with unusual inputs.
